title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **First Giants**
*2026*
Dinosaurs, flying reptiles & giant mammals — create the most prestigious exhibition!
![First Giants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_9e431990.png)

2. **The Legacy Of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy Of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_57467ff5.jpg)

3. **Dungeons of the Oak Dell**
*2025*
Innovative fighting system, letting you immerse in every hit you deal to a monster!
![Dungeons of the Oak Dell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_e818b0b9.jpg)

4. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_f4c6bd44.png)

5. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_43b42c25.png)

6. **Morty Sorty Magic Shop**
*2026*
Apprentices try to demonstrate their talent for stocking the shelves.
![Morty Sorty Magic Shop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_63d785f5.jpg)

7. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_09997598.jpg)

8. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_63cd9460.jpg)

9. **Elysium**
*2015*
Create mighty combinations, write epic legends, and earn the favour of the Gods.
![Elysium](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_e403aec3.png)

10. **JinxO**
*2024*
Jinx your friend to become victorious.
![JinxO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_a86e1c4a.jpg)

11. **The Old Prince 1871**
*2022*
Entanglement, forced compromises & variously (un)welcome "friends".
![The Old Prince 1871](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_374b4bff.png)

12. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_6a3774cb.png)

13. **Dragons Down**
*2024*
Explore a fantasy sandbox world inspired by Magic Realm seeking fame and fortune.
![Dragons Down](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_c1b64e17.jpg)

14. **Cozy Stickerville**
*2026*
Build your village with over 800 stickers! 
![Cozy Stickerville](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_165ae91c.jpg)

15. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_458ada51.jpg)

16. **Boss Fighters QR**
*2025*
Team up and use your wits and gear to crack the tactics of intelligent boss monsters.
![Boss Fighters QR](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_e16b2fe5.jpg)

17. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_ad30a8a0.jpg)

18. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_d39e16e0.jpg)

19. **Vantage**
*2025*
Explore an entire planet's open world from a first-person perspective.
![Vantage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_34031e92.jpg)

20. **Feya's Swamp**
*2025*
Rise as the most prosperous clan in this magical swamp.
![Feya's Swamp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_b9d6cdfb.png)

21. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_1aeb4bdf.png)

22. **Emberleaf**
*2025*
Rally heroes, reclaim the forest, and restore the Emberlings' sacred homeland.
![Emberleaf](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_c7d466bd.jpg)

23. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_71b4c3c8.jpg)

24. **Hot Streak**
*2025*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_ee00e580.jpg)

25. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_4932c5e8.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_17cab8e7.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_0e5a2fe3.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_32e8e9e7.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_b816bfe8.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_facb9e3f.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_02677615.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_bc354965.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*115 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_11c9c6bb.jpg)

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*41 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_4ee7d4e4.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_9a125c31.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_b6fc2c8a.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_de588895.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_29f80b24.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_d2c2fa16.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_5273e4bb.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_1e92d8d2.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_2fa51a7f.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*10 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_c4e82f2b.jpg)

19. **Brass: Birmingham**
*17 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_98324222.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*10 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_26f3e1ea.jpg)

21. **Magical Athlete**
*3 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_404c1f0f.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*274 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_7356b7f5.jpg)

23. **The White Castle**
*30 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_61d598b2.jpg)

24. **SCOUT**
*41 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_2f503a54.png)

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-21/toplist/bgg_16ef3ba1.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com
